title: First Day of Week ( FirstDayOfWeek)
text: First Day of Week ( FirstDayOfWeek) Numeric value representing the day that is considered to be the first day of the week, with 0 representing Monday and 6 representing Sunday. Default is 6 . FirstDayOfWeek = " Number " Value Description 0 Monday 1 Tuesday 2 Wednesday 3 Thursday 4 Friday 5 Saturday 6 Sunday Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(CALENDAR) = "FirstDayOfWeek=0" Copy Applies To (umonthcalendar) MonthCalendar Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
